arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up in Premier League fixture vs Southampton
arts.sum: Man United will be eyeing their first Premier League win in more than a month when they welcome Southampton to Old Trafford on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Arsenal in striker TALKS, Chelsea SWAP latest, Rashford Man Utd EXIT
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including Arsenal's plan to add a striker this month, Chelsea's ongoing talks with Bayern Munich over a potential swap deal involving Christopher Nkunku and Barcelona's interest in Man Utd wantaway Marcus Rashford . arts.ttl: Thursday's Premier League predictions including Man United vs. Southampton
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Manchester United vs. Southampton.

arts.ttl: Attacker benched with three changes - Manchester United predicted XI vs Southampton
arts.sum: Man United will be targeting their first Premier League win of 2025 when Southampton visit Old Trafford tonight.

arts.ttl: Man Utd open talks with Barcelona over INJURED star
arts.sum: Midfielders Casemiro and Christian Eriksen are expected to leave Old Trafford this year - and perhaps this month - which means that Man Utd will have to bring in midfielders. Former Denmark international Per Frimann believes that Man Utd should replace Casemiro with Sporting CP's Morten Hjulmand, whom Ruben Amorim once described as more 'complete' than Manuel Ugarte, but his €80 million release clause makes a deal unlikely.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Napoli eye Man Utd star, Arsenal want Vlahovic, Zubimendi latest
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to sign a striker after Gabriel Jesus suffered an ACL injury, Marcus Rashford is set to leave Manchester United and Liverpool are expected to keep hold of Trent Alexander-Arnold for at least the rest of the season

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Southampton: TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United welcome Premier League strugglers Southampton to Old Trafford with both sides in real need of three points due to their respective poor seasons so far

arts.ttl: Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim explains why Lisandro Martinez went up front vs Arsenal
arts.sum: At the end of their two-hour slugfest with Arsenal, Man United had a full back at centre back, a midfielder at wing back and a centre back up front.

arts.ttl: 'He was dead' - Amorim reveals how dedicated Harry Maguire was for Manchester United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim spoke at length about Harry Maguire and gave significant injury updates on Luke Shaw and Mason Mount.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Alejandro Garnacho exit agreement revealed amid Viktor Gyokeres boost
arts.sum: Manchester United are desperate to add a new forward to their squad in the January transfer window with Alejandro Garnacho and Marcus Rashford edging towards the Old Trafford exit door
